title: A Bouquet to Let Feelings Bloom

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After finishing lunch, I was taking a walk when I ran into Curren Bouquetd'or, who was sitting and reading a book.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Ah—Hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: A photo book—of flowers and bouquets.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: It's very educational. I—also love making bouquets, you see.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: The person you want to give it to, the situation—depending on the purpose, the flowers you choose will change.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Of course—it's not just the flowers. The wrapping, the fragrance, all the various combinations—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …Ah. I'm sorry, did I—talk too much?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: —I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Many girls get completely absorbed when talking about things they love, but Curren Bouquetd'or is quite reserved. So much so that it actually makes me want to hear more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What kind of bouquet would 
Curren Bouquetd'or make if she were giving it to someone important to her? I decide to ask her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Someone important—you ask? Let's see, for example—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: If I were giving one to my mother.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Colors that evoke the image of—the sun, and the warmth of the air bathed in its light—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: I want to give her a bouquet that—makes her feel at ease when she receives it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That image is likely how Curren Bouquetd'or views her own mother.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Choosing and thinking—while keeping the recipient in mind. That kind of time is—so much fun for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looking at Curren Bouquetd'or speaking with such a soft expression—
choice_data_list: <size=38>Whoever receives it would be very happy</size>
<size=38>Whoever receives it would be very happy</size>
<size=38>Makes me want to try giving one to someone</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looking at Curren Bouquetd'or speaking with such a soft expression—
choice_data_list: <size=38>Whoever receives it would be very happy</size>
<size=38>Whoever receives it would be very happy</size>
<size=38>Makes me want to try giving one to someone</size>

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: —Do you think so?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: If the feelings I put into the bouquet—can get across, even just a little.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …I would be happy, too. If we could both share the same feelings—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: That would be a very—happy thing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
You've taken an interest—haven't you? 
—I'm very happy.
choice_data_list: <size=40>Could you help me choose some flowers?<size=40>

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Of course. Please—allow me to help.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: So that you—and the person you give them to, can surround yourselves with a beautiful bouquet and feel at peace—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: I'll choose them—with that wish in mind.
